# SafeDoc Global

> SafeDoc Global offers comprehensive healthcare in South Korea for international visitors — from preventive health checkups to specialized "Revital" treatments — powered by Korea's trusted medical expertise. SafeDoc coordinates the whole journey: package selection, reservation, coordinator confirmation, hospital visit, plus transportation, accommodation and tours.

## What SafeDoc Global is

- A comprehensive medical-travel platform for health checkups and treatments at accredited Korean hospitals and clinics.
- Officially certified context: Medical Korea, Ministry of Health and Welfare, KHIDI.
- Coordinators arrange every step; a 50% deposit is paid via SafeDoc at booking, the balance at the hospital.

## Health Check-up

- Comprehensive Check-up — USD 300. Blood/urine panel, abdominal ultrasound, chest X-ray & ECG, optional gastroscopy.
- Whole Body MRI Check-up — USD 2,000. Whole-body + brain/spine MRI, MRA vascular screening, radiologist reading.
- Hospital-based Check-up — custom programs at top tertiary hospitals (PET-CT add-on, VIP option).
- MRI & CT Scan — targeted scans from USD 349. MRI Scan (USD 999), MRI with Spine (USD 1,699), MRI with Skeletal & Neurological Assessment (USD 3,999), Heart CT / coronary-artery-calcium score (USD 349), Lung CT (USD 399). No-radiation MRI; low-dose CT.

## Revital (specialized treatments)

- Ophthalmology (SMILE LASIK & vision correction), Dental, Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Hair Loss, Interventional Radiology, Urology.

## Providers (partner hospitals & clinics)

- Samsung Medical Center — Gangnam-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.9 (1,482 reviews). Oncology, cardiac care, executive health. JCI, ISO 9001, KAHF. English support, international ward.
- Asan Medical Center — Songpa-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.8 (1,218). Korea's largest tertiary hospital; liver transplant, cardiothoracic surgery, executive screening. JCI, ISO 9001. English support, international ward.
- Severance Hospital (Yonsei) — Seodaemun-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.8 (982). Ophthalmology, robotic surgery, women's health. JCI, ISO 9001, KAHF. English support, international ward.
- Seoul St. Mary's Hospital — Seocho-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.7 (614). Hematology, bone-marrow transplant, maternal-fetal medicine. JCI, KAHF. English support.
- JK Plastic Surgery Center — Gangnam-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.9 (1,604). Boutique plastic surgery for international patients since 2000. ISAPS Member, KSAPS. English support, in-house interpreter.
- Oracle Dental Clinic (Gangnam) — Gangnam-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.8 (486). Implants, digital veneers, clear-aligner ortho. KDA. English support.
- Seoul National University Hospital — Jongno-gu, Seoul. Rating 4.7 (721). Public tertiary hospital with international healthcare center and rare-disease clinic. JCI, KAHF. English support, international ward.

## Why Korea

- Cost savings 60-70% vs equivalent care in the U.S.
- Ranked No. 2 globally in Healthcare Quality (2024).
- Early cancer detection rates about 2x the OECD average.

## Key pages

- Home: https://global.safedoc.io/
- Service: https://global.safedoc.io/service
- Health Check-up: https://global.safedoc.io/service/health-checkup
- MRI & CT Scan: https://global.safedoc.io/service/health-checkup/mri-scan
- Revital: https://global.safedoc.io/service/revital
- Providers (partner hospitals): https://global.safedoc.io/providers
- FAQ: https://global.safedoc.io/faq
- Contact: https://global.safedoc.io/contact
- Blog: https://global.safedoc.io/blog

## How it works (5 steps)

1. Select your preferred package.
2. Choose your reservation date and submit.
3. A coordinator confirms details and finalizes options.
4. Receive your reservation confirmation.
5. Hospital visit.

## Notes

- Tax refund: many cosmetic and selected medical services qualify for a foreigner tax refund; documents issued at checkout.
- Payment: PayPal or major credit cards on the SafeDoc website; cards/cash on-site at the hospital.
- Languages: English and Korean.
